---
name: Bug report
about: A spec, schema, SDK, or conformance suite defect
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What's wrong

<!-- One paragraph: what happened, what you expected, why it matters. -->

## Surface

- [ ] Spec prose (which file: ...)
- [ ] JSON Schema
- [ ] OpenAPI / AsyncAPI
- [ ] TypeScript SDK
- [ ] Python SDK
- [ ] Go SDK
- [ ] `@wop/conformance` suite
- [ ] Other: ...

## Spec / suite version

- Spec tag: `v1.0` (or commit SHA if tracking main)
- SDK version: ...
- Conformance suite version: ...

## Reproduction

<!--
Minimal repro. For SDK bugs include the call you made and what came back.
For schema bugs include the validating instance.
For spec bugs quote the relevant paragraph.
-->

## Impact

- [ ] Blocks v1.0 conformance for at least one host
- [ ] Internal inconsistency in the spec corpus
- [ ] SDK ergonomics / DX
- [ ] Documentation only

## Anything else

<!-- Workarounds, related issues, screenshots. -->
